description: Creates a Data Transformation Profile in AWS HealthLake that converts healthcare data from a source format (such as C-CDA or CSV) into FHIR R4. A profile is immutable once created; to change its template content, replace the resource. Only its tags can be updated in place.

StarterProfileSource.description: Create the profile from a predefined starter profile of transformation templates.

StarterProfileName.description: The name of the starter profile to seed the profile from.
StarterProfileName.markdownDescription:
The name of the starter profile to seed the profile from.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

StarterProfileSource.markdownDescription:
Create the profile from a predefined starter profile of transformation templates.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ExistingVersionedProfileSource.description: Create the profile by cloning a specific version of an existing profile.

ProfileId.description: The unique identifier of the source profile to clone.
ProfileId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the source profile to clone.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

Version.description: The version number of the source profile to clone.
Version.markdownDescription:
The version number of the source profile to clone.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

ExistingVersionedProfileSource.markdownDescription:
Create the profile by cloning a specific version of an existing profile.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ProfileMappingSource.description: Create the profile from raw Velocity template mapping content.

ProfileMapping.description: Map of template file paths to their Velocity template content.

^.+$.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

ProfileMapping.markdownDescription:
Map of template file paths to their Velocity template content.

---

Required: Yes  
Update requires: No interruption

ProfileMappingSource.markdownDescription:
Create the profile from raw Velocity template mapping content.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Source.description: The source from which to create the profile's initial template content. Exactly one of the members must be specified. Use StarterProfile (C-CDA only), ProfileMapping (C-CDA or CSV), or ExistingVersionedProfileId to clone an existing profile. Each produces a published profile.
Source.markdownDescription:
The source from which to create the profile's initial template content. Exactly one of the members must be specified. Use StarterProfile (C-CDA only), ProfileMapping (C-CDA or CSV), or ExistingVersionedProfileId to clone an existing profile. Each produces a published profile.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with the profile.

Key.markdownDescription:
The key of the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
The value of the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
A key-value pair to associate with the profile.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the data transformation profile.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the data transformation profile.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws(-[a-z]+)*:healthlake:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:dataTransformationProfile/[a-f0-9]{32}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ProfileId.description: The unique, server-generated identifier of the profile (32-character lowercase hexadecimal).
ProfileId.markdownDescription:
The unique, server-generated identifier of the profile (32-character lowercase hexadecimal).

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 32  
Maximum Length: 32  
Pattern: ^[a-f0-9]{32}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ProfileName.description: The human-readable name of the profile.
ProfileName.markdownDescription:
The human-readable name of the profile.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: Replacement

SourceFormat.description: The source format that this profile converts from.
SourceFormat.markdownDescription:
The source format that this profile converts from.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CCDA | CSV  
Update requires: Replacement

TargetFormat.description: The target format that this profile converts to. Always FHIR_R4.
TargetFormat.markdownDescription:
The target format that this profile converts to. Always FHIR_R4.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: FHIR_R4  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

KmsKeyId.description: The identifier (key ID or ARN) of a customer-managed KMS key used to encrypt the profile's template content at rest. If omitted, an AWS owned key is used.
KmsKeyId.markdownDescription:
The identifier (key ID or ARN) of a customer-managed KMS key used to encrypt the profile's template content at rest. If omitted, an AWS owned key is used.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Update requires: Replacement

ProfileDescription.description: A human-readable description of the profile's purpose.
ProfileDescription.markdownDescription:
A human-readable description of the profile's purpose.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1000  
Update requires: Replacement

Tags.description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this profile.

An array of key-value pairs to apply to this profile.

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption
